## Description

Describe the clips you are contributing.

Example:

- source (screen recording / phone recording)
- estimated duration
- audio format

## Clip Details

- Number of clips:
- Total duration:
- Background noise level: low / medium / high

## Notes

Anything contributors should know about this audio.
